category_sources: Official Ruby LSP docs describe it as an implementation of the language server protocol for Ruby.
source_facts.description says it is an opinionated language server for Ruby.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and GitHub README use Ruby LSP.
docs_sources: Official README points users to the official documentation for supported features.
source_facts.homepage is the official Ruby LSP documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Shopify/ruby-lsp; per instruction repo is returned as null when source_facts.repo is present.
tags_sources: Official docs describe LSP features such as hover, completion, diagnostics, formatting, code actions, and editor integrations.
